scripts.verify:design-spec: npm run build:design-spec && npm run test:ddd-spec && npx -y -p typescript tsc --noEmit && npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer install --no-fund --no-audit && npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer run build
scripts.dev:design-spec-viewer: npm run build:design-spec && npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer install --no-fund --no-audit && npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer run dev --
